productDisplayName: Myntra Men's I don't suffer from insanity Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWash care1. Light machine wash 2. Do not bleach 3. Warm iron on reverse 4. Do not dry clean 5. Dry flat/reverse 6. People may think you're crazy, but if you know  that all you do is think out of the box, then speak your heart loud and clear in this tee. Team this with jeans or cargoes on casual outings or use it as a Friday dressing to work. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
